description: Known snapshot_id collisions under the pre-content-addressed mint (sha1(methodology + seed-manifest_hash)[:12]). Published snapshots are never rewritten; this allowlist lets collectors/snapshot_identity.py --check pass the documented historical pair. Append-only.

allowlist.reason: Pre-fix collision (WP-B / 2026-07-10 ERRATA): same seed-manifest hash for two different entity payloads under ISO week 2026-w27 (methodology m2). 2026-07-03 has 133 entities; 2026-07-04 has 135. Claim-URNs minted with epoch 2026-w27 under m2 are ambiguous across these two snapshots.
